india.title: Japanese proverb of the day: 'Even the judgement of hell depends on money'
india.summary: A longstanding Japanese saying, 'Even the judgement of hell depends on money,' emphasizes the pervasive role of wealth in shaping outcomes. Grounded in Buddhist philosophy, this proverb critiques the tendency of financial might to influence justice in legal, political, and social spheres, questioning the very notion of fairness. It serves as an important reminder that economic status often governs access and treatment, igniting ongoing discussions worldwide.
